generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital community preparedness is for national security. Local resilience programs aren't just about emergencies - they're about maintaining order and protecting our way of life. Every responsible citizen should support these initiatives. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
